home.name: Chad Feierstein
home.tagline: I create digital experiences that not only look beautiful but also work perfectly.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm a passionate frontend developer with a love for clean code and innovative designs. With several years of experience in modern web technologies, I create digital experiences that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
about.focus: My focus is on Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and modern TypeScript.

hero.title: Chad Feierstein
hero.subtitle: My name is Chad Feierstein, and technology is my great passion. From a young age, I have been fascinated by the art of mastering complex challenges through innovative digital solutions.

story.title: About Me
story.intro: My name is Chad Feierstein, and technology is my great passion. From a young age, I have been fascinated by the art of mastering complex challenges through innovative digital solutions. This fascination motivates me daily to expand my knowledge and explore new horizons.
story.journey: My professional journey includes comprehensive training as an IT technician and a higher degree (BTS) in Cloud Computing. This academic path, complemented by practical experience, has given me a comprehensive understanding of core IT areas.
story.passion: My passion lies in web development and process automation. I enthusiastically develop customized web applications and implement efficient server solutions.

passion.title: Passion for Technology
passion.description: My passion lies in web development and process automation. I enthusiastically develop customized web applications and implement efficient server solutions.

hobbies.title: Hobbies and Interests
hobbies.description: Outside the digital world, I enjoy precious moments with my family, which also includes our three furry companions. Regular meetings with friends and occasional gaming sessions provide the perfect balance to my technology-driven everyday life.
